hooks.description: Block destructive operations: --no-verify, force-push to protected branches, writes to lockfiles/linter configs/.env*
Append the operation to .forge/session-log.jsonl for audit

After a sub-agent Task completes, write a humanized status-update prompt to .forge/post-stage-prompt.json. The orchestrator picks it up and calls jira_post_status_update (or clickup equivalent) on the next turn.
Load prior state from .forge/state.json if present, surface to orchestrator
Read .forge/ticket-system.json and surface to orchestrator: which ticket system (jira/clickup/none) is configured for this session
Snapshot current session state to .forge/state.json before context compaction
Final state snapshot and verdict-summary to .forge/last-session.md
